items.title: Tech workers urge DOD, Congress to withdraw Anthropic label as a supply chain risk
items.description: Tech workers have signed an open letter urging the Department of War to withdraw its designation of Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" and instead to settle the matter quietly.

items.title: IBM Stock Plunges on AI Threat From Anthropic: Time to Rethink?
items.description: IBM stock has tumbled 20.6% in three months after Anthropic's Claude Code threatened its legacy COBOL moat - can hybrid cloud and watsonx offset the risk?

items.title: Software Likely Bottomed Last Week: 3 Companies I'm Buying
Best-Performing ETF Areas of February
items.description: AI fears, geopolitical tensions and strong earnings shaped February markets, but select ETFs surged, led by tanker shipping, Korea and energy plays.

items.title: Semantic Web Market Research Report 2025-2030: Semantic AI Convergence Unlocks Real-Time Analytics, Autonomous Systems and Intelligent Automation
items.description: The global semantic web market is set to expand from USD 2.71 billion in 2025 to USD 7.73 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 23.3%. This growth is fueled by enterprises adopting structured data frameworks to enhance interoperability and AI-driven analytics, motivated by regulatory compliance in sectors like finance and healthcare. With cloud-based graph management driving easier access to semantic technologies, businesses are increasingly embracing ontology alignment and contextual data tagging. Nort
